name: Fg Beer and Cheddar Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the peanut oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped carrots, onions, and celery. Cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
4. Season with salt, pepper, dry mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
6. In a separate bowl, mix the flour with an equal amount of cheese until combined.
7. Gradually add this mixture to the soup while stirring constantly.
8. Stir until the cheese has melted completely.
9. Add the sliced sausages and beer to the pot.
10. Return the pot to low heat and allow it to simmer for a few more minutes.
11. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
12. Serve with homemade bread.
